name: zoom-workplace
description: Search Zoom Team Chat, ask AI Companion grounded questions, and read meeting transcripts — all in Claude.
long_description: Bring your Zoom Workplace into Claude. Search messages, channels, and meetings with AI Companion; ask grounded questions with citations; browse channels, contacts, and shared spaces; read meeting transcripts and AI-generated summaries; resolve people and channels by name. Read-only by design, secured with PKCE (no client secret), and zero-config for PortSwigger Swiggers — double-click to install and authorise once.
